attacking_style: Shows ability to bridge solo from GC groups to stage contenders on climbs, demonstrating climbing strength and tactical opportunism when allowed freedom from team constraints.
team_tactics: Inconsistent team support across DSM and Ineos eras - sometimes held back from breaks despite viable GC gap, other times used as climbing depth rather than protected leader.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages suit his climbing capabilities best, particularly when positioned to pursue stage opportunities from minor GC positions rather than defending high placement.
vulnerability: Susceptible to deep fatigue accumulation in third week of Grand Tours, losing 5+ minutes when exhausted. Crash involvement has disrupted preparation before key mountain blocks.
key_patterns: Third-week fatigue: dropped badly by favorites losing 5+ minutes when accumulated fatigue hits
Team tactical mismanagement: kept from breaks or crashes compromise form before critical stages
Young climber profile: showed strong solo bridging ability at age 22 in Giro
form_trajectory: negative: recent Grand Tour appearances marred by late-race crashes and deep third-week fatigue limiting sustained performance
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7
